hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -e '.stop_hook_active == true' >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); EXIT=$?; if [ "$EXIT" -ne 0 ]; then jq -n --arg r "$(printf '%s\n' "$OUT" | head -200)" '{decision:"block", reason:("TypeScript errors — fix before finishing:\n" + $r)}'; fi
